description: Governed OT data tap: 14 field protocols + cross-protocol RCA brain; audit + MOC gating.
name: io.github.industrial-aiops/iaiops

environmentVariables.description: Tool-menu selection: comma-separated protocols or a named profile (e.g. 'fab', 'process', 'building', 'opcua,modbus'). No default since 0.10.0 — unset prints the selection menu and exits; set to a profile name (e.g. factory) or comma-list of protocols.
environmentVariables.name: IAIOPS_MCP

environmentVariables.description: Path to the endpoints config YAML (default: ~/.iaiops/config.yaml).
environmentVariables.name: IAIOPS_CONFIG

environmentVariables.description: Master password unlocking the encrypted secret store (~/.iaiops/secrets.enc).
environmentVariables.name: IAIOPS_MASTER_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to withhold every write tool from list_tools() at registration time. The tools cease to exist rather than refusing at call time, so a weak or local model cannot call what it cannot see. Read-only means no control-path write; it does not stop data egress (see IAIOPS_NO_EGRESS).
environmentVariables.name: IAIOPS_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to withhold every data-shipping tool (message bus, external historian, remote LLM) from list_tools() at registration time. Orthogonal to IAIOPS_READ_ONLY: set both for a read-only sealed tap. Gates MCP tools only — not a firewall.
environmentVariables.name: IAIOPS_NO_EGRESS

title: Industrial-AIOps
